form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at her last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't threatened at her last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was continually bumped and was inclined to shift wider in the back straight.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 400m at The Gardens behind Road To Jerry's beaten 8 lengths (23.62). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at Taree Super Track over 300m (17.52) beating Extreme Blue in Maiden on April 8. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn, checked off heels and shifted outwards as a result.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (25.41) at big odds over 431m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when sixth (20.58) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when fourth (25.75) at this track at last run and returns here after a eight months break. Can pose a serious challenge.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.46) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Suited here and expected to run well.
